description: Intake core: SourceAdapter/IntakeResult/ProtocolMeta/IntakeInput types + registry (detectBest/ingest) + ctgov adapter wrapping fetchProtocol, mapped onto ProtocolMeta. Original 19 tests stay green.
Envelope extractors: text passthrough + zip (PKZIP central-dir + zlib inflateRaw, zero-dep) + pdf (stream + FlateDecode + Tj/TJ). Tests.
locateEligibility: deterministic heuristic (Inclusion/Exclusion/Eligibility heading slice), offline-first, optional Claude upgrade behind env. Tests.
Document adapter (envelope -> locate -> eligibilityText -> parse.ts) + born-digital protocol + synopsis fixtures. Tests.
FHIR EvidenceVariable adapter: map characteristics -> preParsedCriteria (skip LLM), trust high. Fixture + tests.
EU CTR registry adapter (EudraCT id) with live-optional fetch + cached fixture fallback (ctgov discipline). Tests.
scripts/demo-intake.ts + npm demo:intake: run every registered adapter over its cached fixture, print sourceId | registry | trust | criteria count.
Long tail: eCTD .zip adapter (reuse zip envelope, find Module 5 protocol). Tests.
Long tail: XLSX eligibility-matrix adapter (reuse zip envelope, sheet XML -> rows). Tests.
Long tail: ATLAS/OHDSI cohort JSON adapter -> preParsedCriteria. Tests.
